javadoc_before:
/** * Builds a new {@link CharSequenceInputStream} instance. *

* For example: *

* * 
{@code
     * CharSequenceInputStream s = CharSequenceInputStream.builder()
     *   .setBufferSize(8192)
     *   .setCharSequence("String")
     *   .setCharsetEncoder(Charset.defaultCharset())
     *   .get();}
     *
* * @since 2.13.0 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Builds a new {@link CharSequenceInputStream} instance. *

* For example: *

*

Using a Charset

* 
{@code
     * CharSequenceInputStream s = CharSequenceInputStream.builder()
     *   .setBufferSize(8192)
     *   .setCharSequence("String")
     *   .setCharset(Charset.defaultCharset())
     *   .get();}
     *
*

Using a CharsetEncoder

* 
{@code
     * CharSequenceInputStream s = CharSequenceInputStream.builder()
     *   .setBufferSize(8192)
     *   .setCharSequence("String")
     *   .setCharsetEncoder(Charset.defaultCharset().newEncoder()
     *     .onMalformedInput(CodingErrorAction.REPLACE)
     *     .onUnmappableCharacter(CodingErrorAction.REPLACE))
     *   .get();}
     *
* * @since 2.13.0 */
